g.text: calculate_percentile( samples: deque[float], percentile: float ) -> float

Algorithm Steps ──────────────────────────────── 1. snapshot = list(samples) # Copy deque to list
2. if len(snapshot) == 0: return 0.0
3. sorted_data = sorted(snapshot) # Ascending sort
4. n = len(sorted_data)
5. index = (n - 1) * (percentile / 100) # Linear interpolation
6. lower_idx = floor(index) upper_idx = ceil(index)
7. if lower_idx == upper_idx: return sorted_data[lower_idx] else: weight = index - lower_idx return sorted_data[lower_idx] * (1 - weight) + sorted_data[upper_idx] * weight

text.tspan: # HELP batcher_queue_wait_ms Queue wait time in milliseconds
